summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Google Maps API, Multi-location pharmacy support, POD submission, and Driver Portal workflow. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified POD modal with signature pad, photo capture, and complete delivery workflow.

backend: POST /api/maps/geocode - Returns real coordinates for Google HQ (37.43, -122.08)
POST /api/maps/geocode - Returns real coordinates for NYC address (40.7, -73.9)
POST /api/driver-portal/deliveries/{id}/pod - Requires valid delivery (404 for invalid)
Complete delivery workflow: Create order -> Assign driver -> Pickup -> In transit -> POD submission -> Delivered
frontend: Homepage loads with RX Expresss branding
Driver Portal login form with Quick Demo Access buttons
Driver Portal dashboard shows driver profile (Mike Driver)
Delivery card with order number, address, package count
Pickup and Deliver buttons on delivery cards
QR Scanner modal opens on Deliver button click
Delivery Details modal with full order info
Complete Delivery (POD) button in details modal
POD Modal - Signature tab with canvas
POD Modal - Clear and Confirm Signature buttons
POD Modal - Cancel and Complete Delivery buttons
All data-testid attributes present for testing

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug: server.py was using order['patient_id'] which doesn't exist in new Order model - changed to order.get('recipient', {})
Google Maps API key is configured and returning real coordinates
POD endpoint correctly accepts JSON body (DriverPodSubmit model) instead of query params
Multi-location pharmacy CRUD operations all working correctly
Driver portal complete workflow tested end-to-end
seed_data_creation: Created test orders and locations during workflow testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google Maps API is now configured and returning real coordinates. POD submission uses JSON body with DriverPodSubmit model. Multi-location pharmacy support is fully functional. Driver portal workflow: Login -> View deliveries -> Click delivery card -> Delivery Details modal -> Complete Delivery (POD) -> POD Modal with signature/photo capture.

example_response.formatted_address: 1600 Amphitheatre Pkwy, Mountain View, CA 94043, USA

pod_submission.status: WORKING - Accepts JSON body, validates signature requirement

steps: 3. Click delivery card to open details
6. Submit POD - order marked as delivered

bugs_fixed.issue: KeyError: 'patient_id' when assigning driver to order
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Order model uses 'recipient' object instead of 'patient_id'
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed order['patient_id'] to order.get('recipient', {}) in 3 locations (lines 771, 832, 2773)
